nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Visayan blue fantail
nodes.summary: Visayan blue fantail（Visayan blue fantail，学名 Rhipidura samarensis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: Samar Island Natural Park
nodes.summary: Samar Island Natural Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联36种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等36种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape
nodes.summary: Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括Black-faced coucal、Philippine drongo-cuckoo、Philippine hawk-cuckoo等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas like Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Occurs in a few protected areas like Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape in Bohol and Samar Island Natural Park but actual protection and enforcement from illegal logging and hunting are lax
